mapper.update: update user_study_time set total_hours = #{hours} where user_id = #{userId}
update user_study_time set daily_hours = #{hours} where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into user_study_time(user_id, total_hours, daily_hours) value (#{userId}, 0.00, 0.00)
mapper.select: select * from user_study_time order by daily_hours desc limit 10
select * from user_study_time order by total_hours desc limit 10
select * from user_study_time order by points desc limit 10
mapper.update: update user_study_time set points = #{points} where user_id = #{userId}
